candidates.headline: Say goodbye to free ChatGPT with no ads
candidates.description: OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT free tier, marking a major shift for the company's flagship product.

data_angle.criteria: How long each chatbot remained ad-free from its initial public launch date until it first introduced advertisements
data_angle.dataset_description: List of major AI chatbots with launch dates from Wikipedia
data_angle.reasoning: Clear reference class of AI chatbots with known launch dates. Ranking by days-until-ads creates surprising spread. Copilot at 9 days vs Siri at 14 years is inherently funny. PERFECT absurdity: OpenAI's non-profit turned for-profit turned ad platform.
